key.name: plan-type
key.description: Claude subscription plan: "pro", "max5", or "max20". Used to calculate usage percentages against plan limits.

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often the indicator refreshes token data from disk.

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Which side of the top panel to place the indicator: "left" or "right".

key.name: show-prefix
key.description: Whether to show the word "Claude" before the progress bar.

key.name: prefix-style
key.description: How to show the Claude prefix: "text" for the word, "icon" for the Claude logo.

key.name: bar-length
key.description: Number of segments in the progress bar (5-30).

key.name: bar-style
key.description: Visual style for the bar: "blocks", "smooth", "dots", "squares", or "thin".

key.name: bar-color
key.description: Color scheme for the progress bar: "white", "green-red", "blue", "purple", "amber", or "rainbow".

key.name: show-time-remaining
key.description: Whether to show estimated time until plan limit is reached.

key.name: estimation-mode
key.description: How aggressively to estimate usage. "conservative" shows raw calculated values, "balanced" applies a small correction factor to approximate /usage, "generous" adds extra margin for safety.
